name: Small Security Blanket - Cloud Island™ Chicken
description:
The Small Security Blanket from cloud island™ makes an im-peck-able addition to baby's nursery decor. Made with a soft, fuzzy fabric, this cuddly baby accessory is a handkerchief-shaped blanket designed in a yellow hue and accented with coordinating satin trimming. It's topped with a plush chicken with a red beak and crest and polka-dotted wings, which will instantly catch your little one's attention and encourage them to play and snuggle to their heart's desire. This chicken-themed security blanket is sure to become their constant companion and will provide soothing comfort during car rides, playtime and beyond. Plus, it's also machine washable, making cleanup and maintenance a breeze.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
